title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 8-K.  LOCAL GOVERNMENT FAIR COMPETITION ACT

§844.41.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as "The Local Government Fair Competition Act".

Acts 2004, No. 736, §1, eff. July 6, 2004.

CHAPTER 8-K.  LOCAL GOVERNMENT FAIR COMPETITION ACT
§844.41.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as "The Local Government Fair Competition Act".
Acts 2004, No. 736, §1, eff. July 6, 2004.
